span.p:
Step 1: low=0 mid=3 (val 7) high=6
left [0..3] sorted (4-7)
target 0 not in range → search right half

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 2: low=4 mid=5 (val 1) high=6
left [4..5] sorted (0,1)
target 0 in range → search left half

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 3: low=4 mid=4 (val 0) high=4
value == target → MATCH index 4
